message:
feat(fp-frame): add skipna aggregates, first/last offset, date arithmetic helpers

- Series: sum_skipna/mean_skipna/min_skipna/max_skipna/std_skipna/var_skipna/median_skipna/prod_skipna
- DataFrame: sum_skipna/mean_skipna/std_agg_skipna/var_agg_skipna/prod_agg_skipna via reduce_numeric_skipna
- Series/DataFrame: first_offset/last_offset with day/month/year offset parsing
- Internal: date_to_jdn/jdn_to_date Julian Day arithmetic, parse_offset_str, shift_date_string
- 9 new tests, 1521 total workspace tests passing, clippy clean

Closes: bd-3arj, bd-ws12

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
